case_title: RANNI HILLYER VS. HOUSES FOR SALE, LLC,

docket_entries.description: REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF HILLYER, RANNI AS TO DEFENDANT HOUSES FOR SALE, LLC, A TEXAS LIMITED LIABILITY COMPANY JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
